bullets: Directed AI/ML-powered personalization in product discovery, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth while building AI roadmap readiness.
Led platform architecture and DevOps maturity work that improved throughput by 15% and made future AI capabilities more scalable.
Owned zero-to-one platform product strategy that generated Rs. 1M+ ARR, creating commercial context for AI-enabled product expansion.
Aligned cross-functional teams around roadmap governance, tripling delivery velocity and creating operating discipline for AI-ready execution.
Partnered with engineering and data science to evaluate ML personalization models and convert behavioral insights into product requirements.
Used behavioral data to re-architect discovery and personalization logic, improving session duration by 40% and strengthening workflow adoption.
Grew Biopharma portfolio revenue 30% through customer-driven pricing, packaging, and portfolio strategy.
Improved delivery economics by reducing development cost 25% and increasing time-to-market speed 15%.
Scaled the Job Guarantee portfolio from Rs. 1M to Rs. 10M by redesigning pricing, packaging, and go-to-market alignment.
headings: AI Product Manager | AI Workflows, Product Strategy & Platform Readiness
Lead Product Manager - Logix Built Solutions Limited | 2025-05 to Present
